query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "representation forcing for bottleneck-free unified multimodal models" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it proposes a novel unified multimodal representation ("PixelBytes Embedding") and explores foundational architectures (RNNs, SSMs, Attention) for the same core mechanism of "unified multimodal models" that the user's question targets, serving as a canonical reference for the field of bottleneck-free unified representation.
